channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Zunk, Junk, and Dunk
item.description:
Zac, Jacob, and Devin play the bagpipes and get psyched about burrito bowls.

Duration: 35:52

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, devin field

item.title: The Sneaky Girl Shuffle
item.description:
Angela, Lisa, and Izzy search the dark web and make up titles for Sam’s memoir.

Duration: 34:46

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, angela giarratana, lisa gilroy, izzy roland

item.title: Lou, Ross, and Jiavani Drink Your Milkshake
item.description:
Lou, Ross, and Jiavani sing some Christian rock and rant about dinner choices.

Duration: 35:17

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, lou wilson, ross bryant, jiavani
